title: v0.2.0 — Security, Multi-Instance, Interactions, DX
overview: Ship 10 features that close competitive gaps with agent-browser while preserving USPs. Features span security (--content-boundaries, --allowed-domains), multi-instance support (auto-instance servers, per-session folders), DX (--json, config file), interactions (dblclick, focus, check, drag, iframe), and distribution (state persistence, platform binaries).
scopeChallenge: Analyzed agent-browser's 27K-line Rust codebase. Selected 10 highest-impact features. Skipped: action-policy (over-engineered), --max-output (our architecture solves this), cloud providers (not our use case), find semantic locators (our ref system is better), auth vault (premature), raw mouse control (rarely needed), video recording (requires ffmpeg).

failureModes.mitigation: Fall back to BROWSE_INSTANCE env var

failureModes.risk: Playwright route() doesn't catch all sub-resources
failureModes.mitigation: Test with real pages; route('**/*') catches all network requests

failureModes.risk: iframe locator scope breaks ref system
failureModes.mitigation: Snapshot within frame re-scopes refs; document limitation
Document limitation; sessionStorage is ephemeral by design

failureModes.risk: Config file JSON parse error crashes CLI
Content boundary nonce leaked via page JS
failureModes.mitigation: Nonce is per-server-process, not exposed to page

testCoverageMap.codepath: dblclick, focus, check, uncheck, drag, keydown, keyup

tasks.title: Auto-Instance Servers via PPID
tasks.description: Replace single shared state file with PPID-based instance isolation. Each parent process (Claude Code instance) gets its own server and Chromium. In cli.ts: compute INSTANCE_ID from process.ppid (or BROWSE_INSTANCE env var). Update STATE_FILE to .browse/browse-server-{instanceId}.json. In server.ts: read BROWSE_INSTANCE env var for state file naming.
acceptanceCriteria: Two CLI processes with different PPIDs get separate state files and separate servers
Two CLI processes with same PPID share one server
BROWSE_INSTANCE=custom env var overrides PPID-based detection
Existing BROWSE_PORT behavior unchanged

tasks.title: Per-Session Output Folders
tasks.description: Move all session artifacts into .browse/sessions/{sessionId}/. Add outputDir field to Session interface in session-manager.ts. Update screenshot/pdf/responsive default paths in meta.ts. Update flushSessionBuffers in server.ts to write logs to session.outputDir.
acceptanceCriteria: Screenshots default to .browse/sessions/{id}/screenshot.png
Console/network logs flush to .browse/sessions/{id}/
User-provided explicit path overrides session dir
Default session uses .browse/sessions/default/

tasks.title: --json Mode for All Commands
tasks.description: Add --json CLI flag. Send X-Browse-Json header. Server wraps responses as {success:true,data:...,command:...} or {success:false,error:...}. Support BROWSE_JSON=1 env var.
acceptanceCriteria: browse --json goto url returns {success:true,data:'Navigated to...',command:'goto'}
browse --json goto invalid:// returns {success:false,error:'...'}
BROWSE_JSON=1 works equivalently
Without --json, output unchanged

tasks.title: --content-boundaries (Prompt Injection Defense)
tasks.description: Wrap page-sourced output in CSPRNG nonce-delimited markers. Parse --content-boundaries flag in cli.ts, send X-Browse-Boundaries header. Server wraps page-content commands (text, html, snapshot, js, eval, console, links, forms, accessibility) in --- BROWSE_CONTENT nonce=<uuid> --- markers. Use crypto.randomUUID() for nonce.
acceptanceCriteria: browse --content-boundaries text wraps output in nonce-delimited markers
browse --content-boundaries click @e3 does NOT wrap
Nonce is a valid UUID, consistent within server process
Origin reflects current page URL

tasks.title: --allowed-domains (Navigation + Resource Blocking)
tasks.description: Block navigation and sub-resource requests outside allowlist. Create src/domain-filter.ts with DomainFilter class. Parse --allowed-domains in cli.ts. Apply via Playwright context.route('**/*') in session-manager.ts. Validate goto URLs in write.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: browse --allowed-domains example.com goto evil.com returns error
browse --allowed-domains *.example.com goto sub.example.com succeeds
Sub-resources from disallowed domains are blocked
Without --allowed-domains, no filtering

tasks.title: Missing Interaction Commands
tasks.description: Add dblclick, focus, check, uncheck, drag, keydown, keyup to src/commands/write.ts. Register in WRITE_COMMANDS set in server.ts. Each follows existing pattern: resolve ref, call Playwright method, return confirmation.
acceptanceCriteria: browse dblclick @e3 double-clicks the element
browse check @e5 checks checkbox; browse uncheck @e5 unchecks
browse drag @e1 @e2 drags source to target
browse dblclick nonexistent returns clear error

tasks.title: iframe Support
tasks.description: Add frame <sel> and frame main commands. Add activeFrame field to BrowserManager. When frame is active, commands target that frame. Use Playwright's page.frameLocator(sel) for scoping.
acceptanceCriteria: browse frame #my-iframe + browse text returns text from iframe
browse frame main returns to main page context
browse click @e3 inside a frame clicks correct element
browse frame nonexistent returns clear error

tasks.title: Config File (browse.json)
tasks.description: Create src/config.ts with loadConfig() that reads browse.json from project root. Schema: {session, json, contentBoundaries, allowedDomains, idleTimeout, viewport, device}. In cli.ts: load config, use as defaults (CLI flags override).
acceptanceCriteria: browse.json with {json:true} makes all commands return JSON
browse.json with {allowedDomains:[...]} blocks other domains
CLI flag overrides browse.json setting
Missing or malformed browse.json silently ignored

tasks.title: State Persistence (state save/load)
tasks.description: Add state save [name] and state load [name] commands using Playwright's context.storageState(). Saves to .browse/states/{name}.json. Add getContext() and replaceContext(storageState) to BrowserManager.
acceptanceCriteria: browse state save mysite saves cookies + localStorage to .browse/states/mysite.json
browse state load mysite restores cookies + localStorage
browse state save without name defaults to 'default'
browse state load nonexistent returns clear error

tasks.title: Platform Binaries
tasks.description: Create scripts/build-all.sh using bun build --compile --target for darwin-arm64, darwin-x64, linux-x64. Update package.json with build:all script and bin wrapper for platform detection.
acceptanceCriteria: bun run build:all produces 3 binaries in dist/
macOS ARM binary runs without Bun installed
Linux x64 binary runs without Bun installed
npm install on machine without Bun can still run browse

tasks.title: Tests for --json, --content-boundaries, --allowed-domains
tasks.description: Integration tests for JSON wrapping, content boundaries, and domain filtering in test/features.test.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: Test JSON wrapping: success and error cases
Test content boundaries: page-content wrapped, actions not
Test domain filtering: blocked/allowed/sub-resources
Test features off by default

tasks.title: Tests for New Interactions and iframe
tasks.description: Integration tests for dblclick, focus, check/uncheck, drag, keydown/keyup, iframe. Create HTML fixtures for testability.
acceptanceCriteria: Test dblclick triggers double-click event
Test check/uncheck toggles checkbox state
Test frame command scopes to iframe content
Test frame main returns to main page

tasks.title: Tests for Auto-Instance, Session Folders, Config, State
tasks.description: Integration and E2E tests for instance isolation, per-session output, config file loading, and state save/load.
acceptanceCriteria: Two processes with different PPIDs get separate servers
Screenshots go to .browse/sessions/{id}/screenshot.png
state save + state load preserves cookies
Config file defaults applied and overridable

tasks.title: Update README, CLAUDE.md, Help Text
tasks.description: Document all 10 features. Update command reference, env vars, architecture diagram, help text in cli.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: README documents all new flags and commands
CLI --help shows new commands and flags
CLAUDE.md reflects updated architecture
Env vars table updated
